description_long: This is a modern ergonomic swivel chair featuring a contoured, butterfly-shaped backrest made from a teal mesh material with a distinctive open lattice pattern for breathability. The seat is also constructed from a matching mesh, providing both comfort and ventilation, and is supported by a robust, metallic central column that branches into a five-pointed star base with black casters for mobility. The chair is equipped with padded, curved armrests in a light gray color, attached to the seat and backrest with sturdy supports. The rear of the chair reveals a white, Y-shaped structural frame that reinforces the backrest and adds a striking visual element. The overall design emphasizes adjustability, comfort, and contemporary aesthetics, making it suitable for office or urban work environments. The materials and build suggest durability and support for extended use.
description: A modern ergonomic swivel chair with a teal mesh back and seat, white Y-frame support, and padded gray armrests on a five-caster base. The design is breathable, adjustable, and visually striking.
description_view_0: Front view shows the butterfly-shaped teal mesh backrest, padded gray armrests, and the contoured mesh seat.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the chair's reclined backrest, armrest profile, and the central support column with five caster legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the white Y-shaped structural frame supporting the mesh backrest and the full five-caster base.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the armrest, mesh seat, and the angle of the backrest.
attribute_central_support_column: A metallic, cylindrical telescoping column with a matte finish, supporting a five-pointed star base with casters.
attribute_seat_back_design: Butterfly-shaped, high backrest made of teal mesh with a pronounced contour and open lattice pattern, reinforced by a white Y-frame.
attribute_armrest_style: Curved, padded armrests in light gray, attached to the seat and backrest with sturdy plastic supports.
